27.04.2026 · keithBeautiful! It's powerful stuff. Have you got to the point of it getting really cathartic or unravling deep trauma and/or suppressed emotions?
27.04.2026 · Theo BonecoYes i would say so. But i don't really have surpressed emotions or traumata that are deep.
27.04.2026 · Theo BonecoMaybe the fear of rejection but dealt also with that, so it doesn't come into my nervous system
27.04.2026 · keithNice one! It's interesting you say that because the whole thing about this kind of stuck energy is that so often it's suppressed and hidden and very often people don't even know it's there. Anyway...f
27.04.2026 · Theo BonecoTotally, if you do martial arts like capoeira and muay thai you totaly can feel those patterns that are stuck, if the body van't move cat like, there is probably some stucked traumata
